ques: List the 3 features mentioned in GitHub's Copilot product page.
answer: The 3 features are: (1) "Go beyond one-size-fits-all" — choose from leading LLMs optimized for speed, accuracy, or cost; (2) "Use your agents, your way" — use GitHub Copilot, your own custom agents, or third-party ones; (3) "Stay in your flow" — Copilot works where you do, across GitHub, your IDE, the CLI, project tools, chat apps, and custom MCP servers.
